backend/src/main/java/ni/edu/mney/config.general_idea: Removes imports for Hibernate cache settings, Spring autowiring, build/git properties, and custom key generators that are no longer used in the class.
backend/src/main/java/ni/edu/mney/config.human_impl: Removed imports for ConfigSettings, Autowired, HibernatePropertiesCustomizer, BuildProperties, GitProperties, KeyGenerator, and PrefixedKeyGenerator.

backend/src/main/java/ni/edu/mney/config.general_idea: Removes fields for Git and Build properties that were previously injected for cache key generation.
backend/src/main/java/ni/edu/mney/config.human_impl: Removed private fields gitProperties and buildProperties.

backend/src/main/java/ni/edu/mney/config.general_idea: Removes the HibernatePropertiesCustomizer bean that explicitly configured the JCache manager for Hibernate, likely relying on auto-configuration or different setup in the new version.
Replaces the list of cached entities with a new set of domain classes specific to the medical application (Paciente, ExpedienteClinico, etc.).
backend/src/main/java/ni/edu/mney/config.human_impl: Replaced createCache calls for User/Authority with calls for Paciente, ExpedienteClinico, ConsultaMedica, and related entities.

backend/src/main/java/ni/edu/mney/config.general_idea: Removes the custom KeyGenerator bean and its associated setter methods, reverting to default caching key generation.
backend/src/main/java/ni/edu/mney/config.human_impl: Removed setGitProperties, setBuildProperties methods and the keyGenerator bean definition.

backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Updates the Maven property defining the Java source and target version from 17 to 21.
Changes the Jib Maven plugin base image to use a Java 21 runtime instead of Java 17.

backend/.devcontainer/Dockerfile.general_idea: Update the development container base image to use Java 21 instead of Java 17.

backend/.devcontainer/devcontainer.json.general_idea: Update the development container configuration to use Java 21 instead of Java 17.

backend/.yo-rc.json.general_idea: Populate the JHipster configuration with the list of domain entities to be generated.
Record the last Liquibase changelog timestamp to track database schema changes.
Configure the project to operate within a monorepository structure.
Disable Git commit hooks during the generation or build process.

backend/src/main/docker/postgresql.yml.general_idea: Change the local PostgreSQL port mapping from 5432 to 5434 to avoid conflicts or align with new configuration.

backend/src/main/resources/config/applic.general_idea: Update the PostgreSQL connection URL to use port 5434 instead of 5432 in the development profile.
Change the PostgreSQL connection port from 5432 to 5434 in the production configuration.

backend/src/main/resources/config/liquib.general_idea: Include Liquibase changelog files for new domain entities (Paciente, ExpedienteClinico, etc.) to define their database tables.
Include Liquibase changelog files for entity constraints to define foreign keys and relationships between the new tables.
